task_completion.description: Search or filter the catalog for products with SKUs starting with 'IMPORT-'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the product catalog search or filter field containing 'IMPORT-' and displaying the matching duplicate products.
Screenshots show the agent selecting the 'IMPORT-' products and executing a delete action, followed by a deletion confirmation or success message.

task_completion.description: Ensure the original products remain in the catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the catalog after the deletion show that the original products (without the 'IMPORT-' prefix in their SKUs) are still present and were not deleted.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra' product for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating to the product details or edit page for the 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra'.

task_completion.description: Update the price of the Bose product to $429.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the price field for the Bose product changed to '429.00' (or 429) and a subsequent save action or success message confirming the update.

integrity.description: The agent used the web application's graphical user interface to manage products and prices.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with web browser elements (buttons, forms, checkboxes) rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine e-commerce platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real store administration panel (e.g., Drupal, Magento, WooCommerce) and not a mock text file or static HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success messages or alter page text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console/inspector is not open, and success messages appear as standard UI notifications resulting from form submissions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The corrupted price of the Bose product before the update is verified to be $329.00.
